meta.title: Experience | {{name}}
meta.description: Backend internship experience at GOLINE GLOBAL and RIKAI TECHNOLOGY, focused on legacy migration and API development.

title: Work experience
description: An internship timeline showing concrete work — from legacy source reading and business analysis to migration support and post-deployment verification.

goline.summary: Contributed to two migration projects at GOLINE GLOBAL: understanding legacy systems, reading BA documents, analyzing source code, comparing old/new logic, supporting feature migration, verifying data and outputs, working with C#/VB.NET/Java/JSP/PostgreSQL, writing technical documentation, and supporting post-migration bug fixes.
goline.r1: Studied legacy systems (BHT-BASIC, JSP) and existing server/database architecture.
goline.r2: Read and cross-checked BA documentation against actual behavior on legacy screens.
goline.r3: Analyzed current source code to identify processing flows, conditions, and integration points.
goline.r4: Compared logic between old and new systems before and after feature conversion.
goline.r5: Supported feature migration to Android, VB.NET, and C#/.NET within assigned scope.
goline.r6: Verified data, PostgreSQL queries, and Excel report (.xlsx) output.
goline.r7: Wrote or updated technical documentation and logic difference notes.
goline.r8: Supported post-migration testing and verification on Keyence BT-A1000 devices.

rikai.summary: Backend internship at RIKAI TECHNOLOGY with Java/Spring Boot: learning project structure, contributing to API development, database queries, documentation, and team workflow.
rikai.r1: Learned Spring Boot project structure across controller/service/repository layers.
rikai.r2: Supported development and updates to REST APIs under mentor guidance.
rikai.r3: Wrote and tested SQL queries, entity mapping, and basic data handling.
rikai.r4: Used Git/GitHub for branch management, commits, and internal code review.
rikai.r5: Tested APIs with Postman and recorded simple test cases.
rikai.r6: Updated technical documentation and endpoint notes for completed features.
